title: Angel Statue from Episode 24
wikitext:
[]: Angel Statue from Episode 24             Quote Post by Ja Ayanami » Fri Feb 01, 2008 12:33 pm I was wondering if anyone knows anything about this statue pictured below. It looks a lot like the formation that Kaworu is first seen sitting on when he meets Shinji. I didn't know if this was the inspiration for that or if there was a story. Please enlighten me.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Feb 01, 2008 5:03 pm The winged victory of Samothrace, if memory serves ... which yes it does.

[]:             Quote Post by MDWigs » Fri Feb 01, 2008 6:31 pm Mr. Tines wrote: The winged victory of Samothrace, if memory serves ... which yes it does.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Feb 01, 2008 7:56 pm I started a thread talking about the Statue that Kaworu was sitting on. Apparently it's a pretrified MPE before 3I happened. Sorta foreshoadowing what will happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Feb 02, 2008 6:27 am Sachiel_13 wrote: I started a thread talking about the Statue that Kaworu was sitting on. Apparently it's a pretrified MPE before 3I happened. Sorta foreshoadowing what will happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Ja Ayanami » Sat Feb 02, 2008 10:01 am Xard wrote: Sachiel_13 wrote: I started a thread talking about the Statue that Kaworu was sitting on. Apparently it's a pretrified MPE before 3I happened. Sorta foreshoadowing what will happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Feb 03, 2008 10:29 pm Ja Ayanami wrote: Well that still could be true. I agree that it makes sense that they statue looks like an MP Eva from after EoE but I don't really think it is one at that point. I think that it is a representation of Kaworu in one form or another, whether that is to show his death when the 'kneck' starts to bleed after he is killed or it is foreshadowing the MP Evas having a Kaworu dummy plug.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Feb 04, 2008 8:15 am I fail to find any in-story reason for why that would me MPE. It doesn't even look like harpy and unlike Rei, there's no Quantum Magic to do the trick

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Feb 04, 2008 8:32 am Xard wrote: I fail to find any in-story reason for why that would me MPE. It doesn't even look like harpy and unlike Rei, there's no Quantum Magic to do the trick

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Feb 04, 2008 8:43 am BobBQ wrote: Xard wrote: I fail to find any in-story reason for why that would me MPE. It doesn't even look like harpy and unlike Rei, there's no Quantum Magic to do the trick

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 04, 2008 9:21 am Old compilation of "angel statue" observations .

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Feb 04, 2008 9:26 am Thanks Reichu :)

[]: I think that the....             Quote Post by EvaYongouki » Thu Jul 22, 2010 12:19 am i think that the statue is the petrified body of evangelion unit-00 in some way... it is at the epicenter of the crater right?

[]: Re: I think that the....             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Jul 22, 2010 12:44 am EvaYongouki wrote: i think that the statue is the petrified body of evangelion unit-00 in some way... it is at the epicenter of the crater right?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jul 22, 2010 11:14 am This thread is now a worse version of the old thread.

[]:             Quote Post by KLVTZ » Fri Jul 23, 2010 2:51 am I love that statue, if only i could get the real thing for my backyard, that would be cool!
